title: SimpleShowItem
description: Show the item you're holding in chat. Including lores and custom names!
body:
ShowItem Plugin ✨️

Description:

With the ShowItem plugin, you can easily display the item you're holding in chat! ✨ It shows all the important details, including custom names, enchantments, lores, and colors, making it perfect for showing off your gear!

![Example1](https://git.normalsurvival.com/Cat/ShowItem/raw/branch/main/showitem-1.jpg)
![Example2](https://git.normalsurvival.com/Cat/ShowItem/raw/branch/main/showitem-2.jpg)

Key Features:
/showitem: Shows the item you're holding in chat with all details (enchants, lores, custom names, colors)!
/giveitem {player} {item} {amount}: A simplified version of the vanilla and Essentials /give command.


Permissions:
showitem-showitem: Required to use the /showitem command.
showitem-giveitem: Required to use the /giveitem command.


By default, access is restricted. Don't forget to add the permission nodes for players who need access! ✅

Perfect for custom servers, adventures, and roleplay!
